name: Spectacular Frozen Corn
recipeIngredient: 35 ears fresh corn (or 16-18 cups cut corn)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F (163°C).
2. Place the corn in a single layer on a baking sheet.
3. Bake for one hour, stirring occasionally until tender.
4. Remove from the oven and allow to cool completely.
5. Once cooled, freeze the corn.
6. To serve, thaw the frozen corn and heat gently in a double boiler or microwave.
